name: D.Gray-man Hallow
overview: Allen Walker is an exorcist working for the Black Order whose mission is to protect mankind from the evil Millennium Earl and his deadly Akuma. Allen and his comrades must recover lost Innocence while defending against the Earl’s terrifying army. But if they fail, Innocence will be lost forever.

trailers.title: TVアニメ新シリーズ「D.Gray-man HALLOW」第2弾PV／2016年7月放送開始!!
